zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Henry Dillon於1232年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼時，他的父親Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany27歲，母親Maud Le Boteler32歲。他於大約1255年與Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Henry Dillon于1232年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany27岁，母亲Maud Le Boteler32岁。他于大约1255年与Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Henry Dillon was born in 1232, in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Ireland, his father, Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany, was 27 and his mother, Maud Le Boteler, was 32. He married Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare about 1255, in Kildare, County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Henry Dillon est né en 1232, à Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlande, son père, Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Maud Le Boteler, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare environ 1255, à Kildare, County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Henry Dillon 1232 in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany 27 und seine Mutter Maud Le Boteler 32. Er hat um 1255 in Kildare, County Kildare, Irland Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Henry Dillon è nato il nel 1232 nel Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Maud Le Boteler, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare circa 1255, nel Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Henry Dillonが1232年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスドルムランエイで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumranyは27歳，母Maud Le Botelerは32歳であった。約1255年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダアでOlivia Fitzgerald of Kildareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はアイルランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Henry Dillon(이)가 1232년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 드럼랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Le Boteler(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1255년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르에서 Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 아일랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Henry Dillon nasceu em 1232, em Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Maud Le Boteler, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare aproximadamente 1255, em Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Henry Dillon родился в 1232 г. в местности друмрани, коунти вестмит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Le Boteler, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare около 1255 г. в местности каилдар, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в местности Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Henry Dillon nació en 1232, en Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Thomas Dillon Lord of Drumrany, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Maud Le Boteler, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare aproximadamente 1255, en Kildare, County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Irlanda.
